queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of lacking a checking account on credit default probability and its contribution to elevated credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Statistical evaluation of how maintaining savings below 100 DM functions as a mitigating factor in credit risk assessment and reduces the likelihood of loan default.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Determinants of default analysis examining the protective effect of critical accounts or other existing credits on borrower solvency and credit risk mitigation.
